morning_thesis: SPY premarket ~755.09 with ribbon BULL stack (Fast 755.01 > Pivot 754.82 > Slow 754.68, 33c spread). Price above all key levels: PMH-turned-support 752.09, PDC 754.37, SMA-50 754.47. VIX 16.13 MID — bull eligible (<17.20 threshold). FOMC Day 1 (meeting 6/16-6/17, decision tomorrow 14:00 ET) creates ceiling on conviction — expect chop/wait-and-see pre-FOMC. Primary range: 752.09 support to 756.68 RTH high resistance. Today's PMH 755.35 is first intraday resistance. Bull thesis: continuation of yesterday's structure as long as ribbon holds BULL and 752.09 holds on 5m close. FOMC caution: manage runners tightly, no chasing into 756.68, entries require confirmed setup per playbook.

predictions.claim: SPY does not close above 756.68 on any 5m bar before 13:00 ET (FOMC churn ceiling holds)
predictions.actual: SPY peaked at 755.39 session high (early morning) and never challenged 756.68. Price ranged 752-755 all day under the FOMC ceiling.

predictions.claim: If SPY tests 752.09, a 5m bar closes above that level within 30 minutes of first touch
predictions.invalidation: 5m close below 752.09 on first or second test of that level
predictions.actual: 752.09 tested at ~13:33-13:48 ET (spy=751.97, 751.94). Recovery above 752 occurred at 14:03 ET (752.11) — ~30-35min after first touch. Close call on timing; ribbon was 67c BEAR at touch blocking confirmed reclaim trigger.

predictions.claim: Ribbon remains BULL stack (Fast > Pivot > Slow) through 11:00 ET open-drive window
predictions.invalidation: Ribbon flips BEAR (Slow > Fast) on any 5m close before 11:00 ET
predictions.actual: Ribbon flipped MIXED at 10:24 ET (3c spread) and BEAR at 10:33 ET (40c spread), 27 minutes before the 11:00 ET cutoff. Open 33c spread was a compression warning.

surprises: FOMC-eve VIX suppression with bearish drift: SPY fell ~$4.77 (755.39→750.62) while VIX fell 16.13→15.85 — institutions stripping hedges pre-FOMC created 'fear gauge down / price down' regime that structurally blocked all BEAR entries (filter 8 requires VIX >17.30 rising).

BULL 11/11 at 14:30 ET (level_reclaim + ribbon_flip simultaneous) blocked by ribbon momentum gate (spread compressing 52c→43c, needs +5c expansion) — trigger criteria met but momentum confirmation failed.
lesson: FOMC-eve sessions can create VIX-suppressed bearish drift — document as named regime, evaluate character-gate discriminator in Sunday weekly review, not a mid-session rule change.
tomorrow_hint: FOMC 14:00 ET — hard block 13:30-15:00. Watch 752.09 for bull/bear pivot; 750.62 session floor is first bear target; 756.68 ceiling still in play.
